stories: Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the 7th of April, 2026
Here's a nice fact to start the day вЂ” today is World Health Day, marking the 78th anniversary of the founding of the World Health Organisation
What began in 1948 as a post-war commitment to universal health now coordinates pandemic response and disease control across 194 countries
A worthy institution to have on your side
For your day вЂ” the Weekly Planning and Look-Ahead with Bob and Rehan is at ten on Webex
L4 C&D runs from 12:30 to one, and Admin and Any Matter closes out the day at five
In Singapore, cost-of-living relief is coming early
And Parliament tabled a new Bill today on how Singapore and Malaysia will handle incidents on the upcoming JB-Singapore RTS Link
Good morning Sean, it's Monday the 6th of April, 2026
Here's a piece of history to kick off your week: today marks exactly 130 years since the opening of the first modern Olympic Games in Athens
Thirteen nations, 241 athletes, and one Monday morning that gave birth to an institution now spanning 200-plus countries
For your day: Weekly Planning with Bob and Rehan at 10 on Webex, L4 C&D at 12:30, Bi-Monthly Catch-Up with Rahul at 2:30 also on Webex, and Admin and Any Matter at 5
And a practical heads-up: from April 15, passengers flying out of Singapore are limited to two power banks
The Civil Aviation Authority announced the change to reduce lithium battery fire risk ГўВЂВ” extras must go before boarding, and charging in-flight is out
On the global stage, the Iran war is escalating
Oil holds above a hundred dollars a barrel as the Strait of Hormuz stays closed ГўВЂВ” Qatari LNG tankers turned back this week rather than attempt transit
